top_signals.title: Interview: French Army chief Schill talks technology, surprise and ‘archaic’ combat
top_signals.summary: "We should avoid excessive analogies. France is not Ukraine," said Gen. Pierre Schill in an interview ahead of the Eurosatory defense expo near Paris.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Inside India newsletter: Hollywood is debating AI. India's filmmakers are embracing it
top_signals.summary: Even as Hollywood remains the world's most influential storyteller, experiments in AI filmmaking are increasingly happening in India.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
